🗑️ Trafford Bin Collections

Present bins by 6:30am · bring them back within 48 hours

M33 7TJ
Loading…

What goes out

  • Grey bin — General / non-recyclable waste
  • Black bin — Mixed recycling — plastics, glass, cans
  • Blue bin — Paper & cardboard
  • Green bin / caddy — Food & garden waste (weekly)

Upcoming collections

    Google Calendar

    Add this postcode's upcoming collections to your Google Calendar. Dates already in your calendar are skipped — re-syncing never creates duplicates.

    Green bin collections are suspended 22–28 December.

    Unofficial app · data from the Trafford Council waste calendar 2025–2026.
